name: skolo

metadata.name: skolo
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A command line tool and python package for SkoloCFD

documentation:
The API for SkoloCFD
============================

skolo is the SkoloCFD Software Development Kit (SDK) for Python


Getting Started
---------------
You can install the library on linux using ``pip``

    $ python -m pip install skolo

Or from the windows command prompt with:

    $ py -m pip install skolo

Or, assuming that you have Python and ``virtualenv`` installed, set up your environment and install the required dependencies like this:

    $ git clone https://github.com/skoloCFD/skolo
    $ cd skolo
    $ virtualenv venv
    ...
    $ . venv/bin/activate
    $ python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
    $ python -m pip install -e .



Configuring Skolo
------------
After installing skolo, you'll need to provide it credential access to the Skolo web server. Instructions for this can be found on the documentation page of the website.

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.conn.checkExist
documentation:
Checks if the Skolo instance (Project, Run, Orientation) exists on the server

Returns
-------
response : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api
    If the HTTPStatusCode in the dict is 200, the Project/Run/Orientaton exists

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Project.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a connection to a Skolo Project

Inputs
----------
proj : string
    Skolo project name
useLocal : bool
    connect to local rather than remote server

Returns
-------
run : object
    An instance of this class

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Project.listRuns
documentation: Returns a list of all runs in the project

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Run.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a connection to a Skolo Run

Inputs
----------
proj : string
    Skolo project name
run : string
    Skolo run number
useLocal : bool
    connect to local rather than remote server

Returns
-------
run : object
    An instance of this class

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Run.listOrientations
documentation: Returns a list of all orientations for a given run; no inputs.

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Run.createNew
documentation:
Function that creates a new run, based on the current run.

Inputs
----------
comment : string
    descriptive comment for the run
tag : string
    descriptine tag for the run - equivalent to "topic" in the Skolo GUI
copyGeometry : bool
    copy all geometry from the baseline run
copyOrientations : bool
    copy all orientations from the baseline run
copySettings : bool
    copy all run settings from the baseline run
copyPostPro : bool
    copy all postPro templates from the baseline run

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a connection to a Skolo Orientation within a Run

Inputs
----------
proj : string
    Skolo project name
run : string
    Skolo run number
orien : string
    Skolo orientation
useLocal : bool
    connect to local rather than remote server

Returns
-------
run : object
    An instance of this class

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.geomCompare
documentation:
Submits a geometry comparison job vs. the baseline

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.kinematics
documentation:
Submits kinematic model movement, and checks the resulting output geometry

Inputs
----------
force : bool
    forces re-running of kinematics for all rideheights whether needed or not - WARNING! overwrites files!

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.geomPrep
documentation:
Submits geomPrep, and checks the resulting output geometry

Inputs
----------
force : bool
    forces re-running of all geomPrep on all CAD files - WARNING! overwrites files!

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation._geomTask
documentation:
Submits geomPrep/kinematics

Optional arguments:
    force:      forces re-running of all geomPrep on all CAD files - WARNING! overwrites files!

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.submit
documentation:
Submits the current orientation with the desired command

Inputs
----------
cmd : string
    the command to run, which can be: setup, mesh, post, or submit (submit includes mesh, solve, post)
costLimit : integer
    Specify a limit to acceptable estimated cost, above which job submission will be aborted

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api

methods.name: skolo.caseObjects.Orientation.upload
documentation:
Uploads geometry to the orientation

Inputs
----------
folder : string
    the file or folder to upload.
    file - the file will always be uploaded
    folder - step, STL or CATIA files in the folder which are NOT already up-to-date on the server will be uploaded (speeds things up)
force : bool
    force the upload of all files in the folder, even if they are already up-to-date on the server

Returns
-------
resp : dict
    Skolo HTTP response dictionary, see https://www.skolocfd.com/docs?topic=Api
